description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted standing upright with arms raised and bent at the elbows, extending backward in an exaggerated manner. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, with visible seams and button details on the top. The person has a slender build, with defined facial features and shoulder-length hair styled with a center part. The shoes are simple and closed-toe, suitable for walking in urban environments. The overall appearance suggests casual attire, appropriate for everyday city life. The exaggerated arm pose is unusual and may indicate a stylized or animated context.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian standing upright with arms raised and bent backward, wearing a sleeveless top and straight pants.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, sleeveless top with button details, and both arms raised and bent backward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's backward extension, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the top, and the unusual backward arm pose.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm position, and the overall stance.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised and bent backward
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length straight hair with center part
